description: Local Ollama server config (~/.ollama/server.json). Best-effort schema: only 'disable_ollama_cloud' is officially documented (https://docs.ollama.com/faq), so unknown keys are still accepted.

disable_ollama_cloud.description: Disables Ollama Cloud features (cloud models, web search); can also be set via the OLLAMA_NO_CLOUD environment variable. Requires a server restart to take effect.

title: Ollama server.json
